name: Ninano: Dream Ranch
short_description: Welcome to the Ranch, where you can raise animals! Diverse locals such as Elves, Demons, Vampires, and others await you. Collaborate with them to build new facilities and invite new neighbors to make the Village vibrant. Enjoy activities like fishing, cooking, gathering, dating, and mini-games!
detailed_description:
DISCORD


About the Game

Dream Ranch is the first of NANANO's series. Cute and mystical stories awaits you!


Ranch life in a fantasy world!

One day when you were beat down by corporate life, you happen to come across an advertisement. The advertisement was looking to hire a ranch hand. Sick of your corporate life, you set off to work at the ranch, dreaming of a leisurely life.

NINANO: Dream Ranch is a game where you raise animals and converse with locals to develop the village.

Neighbors with colorful personalities

  • You'll be able to meet diverse locals such as Elves, Demons, Vampires, Anthropomorphs and many more.
  • Become a friend, a lover or a spouse.
  • Build up your relationship and you just might receive a special gift.

Raising Animals

  • You can evolve animals into various forms.
  • You'll be able to obtain different products depending on their evolution.
  • Care with love and you just might obtain a more precious product.

Village Beautification Project

  • You can build various facilities in the village.
  • You can invite new neighbors to the village. Just like how you moved to the village.
  • Let's spruce up the village to make the place more vibrant.

Food and Cooking

  • You'll have to eat some food when you become hungry.
  • If you don't, you might pass out from hunger.
  • There are many food and recipes to try out. Try collecting them all!

Fishing

  • You can catch different fish depending on the time and place including other factors.
  • There are exotic fish that only exists in NINANO.
  • There are over 80 species to collect!
  • If you are interested, you can donate to the Aquarium to show them off.

Festivals

  • Every year the village holds various festivals and contests.
  • Soda Festival, Fishing Contests, Horse Racing Contests and many more.
  • Experience the village in a whole new way!

There are many other contents that await your attention. Come and enjoy your stay at the Ranch!

supported_languages: English, Korean, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Portugal, Traditional Chinese
